_comment: Phase D2 retest: re-enabled ch=119 entry after fixing the BunchDataBits width bug (14→13 bits in send_generated_bunch). The original D2 run produced a ContentBlockFail which we attributed to stateful RepLayout; a codebase audit uncovered a contradiction (replay parser reads 13 bits for S>C BunchDataBits, but game_server.h was writing 14), which would also produce ContentBlockFail via a 1-bit payload offset. Re-running to disambiguate.

entries.note: Virtual channel — NoopGenerator never returns a bunch.
D2 retest: 4-byte unreliable state update from blueprint_bunches.csv pkt=1978 (payload_hash=c3331608062ef010).
